commit.message:
[Infrastructure] Refactor Orleans state system with attribute-based configuration and transaction support

- add: new State abstraction with StateAttribute and StateAttributeMapper for declarative state configuration
- add: StateSerializer for consistent JSON serialization with type handling
- add: comprehensive grain transaction system (TransactionAttribute, TransactionContext, GrainTransactionHandler)
- add: PostgreSQL jsonb converter for JSONB column serialization
- add: GrainStateTest and GrainTransactionalStateTest for state system validation
- refactor: Orleans state storage and registry to use new State abstraction
- refactor: card implementations (OpponentBomb, OpponentFlagErase, OpponentFlagReshuffle, Smoke, Trebuchet) for state system compatibility
- fix: JsonUtils.Settings exposed as public static for shared serialization configuration
- remove: legacy GrainState.cs in favor of new State abstraction
- add: StatesSetup.cs for centralized state configuration registration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add strict jq-based payload validation to tasks.sh and calendar.sh

Prevent malformed API calls by validating payloads before the HTTP request.
Validates action names (with case-insensitive suggestions), unknown params
(with alias-based "did you mean?" hints), required params, date/time formats,
and enum values. Bad payloads are rejected with clear, corrective error messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace About section image with pleskar1.png

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Align all tools with Sourcegraph Enterprise naming and fix arg prefix bug

Phase 2: Renamed commands across all 5 tools to match Sourcegraph
Enterprise CLI/MCP conventions. Added missing commands for feature parity.

sourcegraph: search→keyword_search, read→read_file, repos→list_repos,
  added list_files, commit_search, diff_search, compare_revisions,
  get_contributor_repos (10 commands total)

batch-changes: added validate, preview, status commands (8 total)

code-monitor: check→trigger_check, check-all→trigger_check_all,
  history→events, added update, toggle, test_action, reset (11 total)

code-owners: query→get, added create, update, delete, unowned (10 total)

code-insights: create→create_insight, update→update_insight,
  trend→series_points, added collect_all, live_preview, validate_query,
  create_dashboard, list_dashboards, add_to_dashboard,
  remove_from_dashboard (15 total)

Fixed double-dash bug: stripped -- prefix from non-positional arg keys
in all tool.json files. The toolshed native runner adds -- automatically
via json_to_cli_args(), so --name in tool.json became ----name at
runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add package install security checks (#1)

* docs: add package install checks design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add .worktrees/ to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add package checks types and Zod schema

Add TypeScript interfaces (PackageChecksConfig, ProviderConfig,
PackageRule, PackageMatch, LicenseSpdxMatch) to types.ts and
corresponding Zod validation schemas to schema.ts. Add packageRules
to PolicyDefinitionSchema. Includes 18 new validation tests covering
valid input, invalid actions, missing fields, extra properties, and
edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add packageRules serialization to YAML output

Serialize packageRules as snake_case package_rules in the YAML policy
output, converting camelCase PackageMatch fields (namePatterns, findingType,
licenseSpdx) to their snake_case equivalents. Adds 14 tests covering all
match fields, severity variants, optional reason, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add default package rules to agentDefault preset

Add 6 packageRules to agentDefault() matching agentsh's agent-default
policy: block critical vulns, malware, typosquats, and copyleft licenses;
warn on medium vulns; approve packages newer than 30 days.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: include packageRules in merge/mergePrepend category handling

Without this, agentDefault({ packageRules: [...] }) extensions would be
silently ignored since merge.ts didn't know about the packageRules category.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: serialize packageChecks config to package_checks YAML

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: preserve default provider priority when set to boolean true

When a default provider (osv, depsdev, local) is explicitly set to `true`,
merge with existing defaults instead of replacing them, so priority is retained.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add package checks to API reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add missing ProviderConfig fields and PackageMatch table

Add type/command/options fields to Provider Config table and a new
PackageMatch Fields table for users writing custom package rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add missing options field to PackageMatch table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove match.options from default package rules

agentsh v0.15.0 rejects match.options in package rules during policy
validation ("match.options is not yet supported"). Removed the
maxAgeDays option from the package_too_new rule to fix e2e failures.

commit.message:
fix: move _orgs block to end of registry in seed script

The _orgs block was being added incrementally inside the loop, causing
subsequent org sections to appear after it. Since restore/sync scripts
break at _orgs:, this meant non-first orgs were never processed.
Now strips any existing _orgs block before seeding and appends it
once at the very end with all orgs deduplicated.

commit.message:
fix: rehab always renders on entry, goTool uses offsetTop for scroll

initRehab: remove dataset.init guard — always re-render tabs (idempotent),
use setTimeout(0) so DOM settles before content renders. Fixes blank
rehab section on every entry.

goTool: replace scrollIntoView with offsetTop chain traversal.
offsetTop is unaffected by CSS transform on animated .view ancestor,
unlike getBoundingClientRect which returns wrong values mid-animation.

Backend:

- POST /api/autopilot/bulk-generate-maps: generate topical maps for N schedules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rate limit detection + protected account message + CSV SPA polling wait

1. CSV SPA navigation fix (główny bug):
   - Zastąpiono statyczny await sleep(2500) → polling co 400ms (maks 10s)
   - Czeka aż React wyrenderuje Follow button / emptyState / page not found
   - SPA navigation (tabs.update) = "complete" szybko, ale React render trwa dłużej
   - To wyjaśnia dlaczego CSV "otwierało profil ale nie startowało"

2. Rate limit detection w followDirectInTab (CSV mode):
   - Wykrywa "rate limited" i "You are unable to follow" w treści strony
   - Zwraca 'rateLimit' → bot kończy sesję zamiast skipować profil

3. Protected account "Pending" message w content.js (seed profile mode):
   - Poprzednio: ⚠️ "Klik mógł nie zadziałać" nawet gdy konto chronione zaobserwowane
   - Teraz: ✅ "Zaobserwował konto chronione" gdy stan = Pending
   - clicked check uwzględnia Pending w aria-label i tekście przycisku

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: perbaiki error 500 saat load profil user di server

- Tambah COALESCE untuk join_method agar tidak null
- Tambah error logging detail di endpoint /api/servers/:id/users/:id
- Frontend fallback ke /api/users/:id jika server endpoint 500

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: home page ticker using wrong price lookup keys

The live ticker used CoinGecko-style keys (e.g. 'bitcoin') but the
backend returns data keyed by symbol (e.g. 'BTC'). Changed to use
token.symbol for correct price matching.

commit.message:
feat: Rewrite prompt strength meter with real multi-dimensional scoring

Replace simplistic 40-base scoring with 10 quality dimensions (length,
role, task, context, specificity, format, constraints, structure,
channel, examples). Raw unimproved prompts now score 18-25%, while
well-engineered prompts with role/context/format score 60-80%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(profile): add Data Management danger zone with bulk delete actions

Add a danger zone section to the Profile page allowing household owners
to bulk delete all pantry items or grocery lists. Includes a reusable
TypeDeleteConfirmDialog component requiring users to type DELETE before
confirming destructive actions.

Implements recipe-meal-planner-i4g

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

Fix surround bleed, voice recycling, distance scaling, and bass boost

- Fix voice recycling bug: reset surround state (is_center, surround_sweep,
  volume pointers) in MV_AllocVoice so stale flags from previous voices
  don't cause audio to bleed into wrong channels
- Fix reverb accumulator leak: always clear center/surround accumulators
  regardless of reverb state to prevent front→surround crosstalk
- Fix surround sweep routing: check IsSurroundSweepSound before soundm&4
  center check, since WAR_AMBIENCE CON flags conflict with center routing
- Fix mono mix optimization: force stereo mix functions in surround mode
  so all 3 passes write both L/R channels
- Fix center channel timing: immediately route volumes in MV_SetVoiceCenter
- Remove WATER_GURGLE from center channel list (environmental, not player)
- Add global distance scaling (1.5x) to compensate for VOLUME_BOOST=4
- Add bass boost (low-shelf ~150Hz) on front buffer
- Add LFE subwoofer feed from front buffer low-frequency content
- Add surround/center +20% volume boost
- Add buildprintf fflush for reliable log output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: paginate Supabase viajes query to bypass 1000-row limit

Supabase/PostgREST caps responses at 1000 rows. The Feb-May range
returned exactly 1000 results leaving viaje 7073 (and others) missing.

Now paginates in 1000-row chunks with order=fecha_salida_origen.asc
until all viajes in the range are loaded. Also tightened range to
month-1 → month+1 to keep payload manageable.

before starting the app.

fix(db): fix RowVersion PostgreSQL compatibility

IsRowVersion() tells EF Core the value is DB-generated (SQL Server
rowversion behavior), but PostgreSQL bytea columns have no auto-
generation. This caused: null value in column "RowVersion" violates
not-null constraint during seed inserts.

Fix: change to IsConcurrencyToken() so EF Core includes the C# default
(Array.Empty<byte>()) in INSERT statements. Regenerate migration.

commit.message:
fix: Make new row first column editable when + button clicked (issue #809)

When a new row is added via the + button, the first column cell was not
receiving the data-editable="true" and data-col-id attributes because the
record ID was null (row not yet saved). This caused startNewRowEdit() to fail
finding the cell, and startNewRowFirstColumnEdit() to abort early since
cell.dataset.colId was undefined.

Fix: Set recordId='new' as a placeholder for the first column of pending new
rows so canEdit evaluates to true and the cell gets all necessary attributes.
Also add a safety handler in startInlineEdit() to delegate to
startNewRowFirstColumnEdit() when recordId='new' to avoid error toasts if
the cell is clicked before the programmatic edit activation.

commit.message:
fix: force vibecanvas baseline binary for CPUs without AVX

Render free tier CPUs lack AVX support. The vibecanvas bin wrapper
tries the AVX binary first, which crashes. Removing vibecanvas-linux-x64
forces fallback to vibecanvas-linux-x64-baseline.

fix: seed profile — IIFE guard w content.js + active:true + zawsze inject

Problemy:
1. let re-declaration: drugi inject content.js rzucał błąd "Cannot redeclare
   block-scoped variable" przed rejestracją listenera → sendMessage bez odbiorcy
2. active:false: X.com może nie renderować followers list w tle (tak jak profile)

Rozwiązania:
- content.js opakowany w IIFE z window.__xbotContentLoaded guard — drugi inject
  jest natychmiastowo zignorowany, bez re-declaration, bez duplikatów listenera
- startSeedProfileSession: active:false → active:true
- background.js: zawsze inject (IIFE guard załatwia bezpieczeństwo, brak potrzeby check)

commit.message:
fix: extract date-only substring from Supabase datetime fields

Supabase returns timestamps (e.g. 2026-03-06T08:00:00) for fecha_salida_origen
and fecha_entrada_destino. Appending T00:00:00 to a full timestamp produced
invalid dates, making all timeline bar calculations return NaN.

Now uses .substring(0,10) when building dateStart/dateEnd in loadSupabase()
and also in renderTimeline() bar calculation for defensive safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix crash when Play Services unavailable: always initialize messageBus (#84)

MessageBusFactory already handles the no-Play-Services case by falling
back to BroadcastMessageBus, but onCreate() gated messageBus creation
on checkPlayServicesAndInitialize(). This left messageBus uninitialized,
causing a UninitializedPropertyAccessException in onResume()/sendMessage()
on devices where Play Store is blocked or missing.
